violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

The door to the outside, located in the hallway near kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
The floor/wall juncture of the column in the kitchen is in poor repair. Inspector observed damages and/or missing coving and the FRP coming off wall. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

Utensils were observed in the service area hand-washing sink, wiping cloths were draped over splash guards. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC threw away wiping rags, utensils were brought to kitchen. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

The door to the outside, located next to kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
The reach-in refrigerator in the kitchen was observed leaking liquid from condenser fan, with a pan to catch drips. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the bottom shelf of reach-in refrigerator has an accumulation of food residue and water. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

The floor and wall junctures at the column base in the do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
A dish scrubber was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Inspector observed hot rice tightly wrapped with plastic wrap in the reach-in refrigerator. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
Per PIC, dishwasher is non-functional. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2024

Bean and Corn Salad was observed held at (64) degrees Fahrenheit (food was observed on counter). Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was placed over ice packs during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

The door to the outside, located in the hall near the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023
